titles.text: New Super Mario World 1: The Twelve Magic Orbs

descriptions.text:
Mario is back for more adventures! This time, Bowser has stolen the 12 Magic Orbs that were kept in Princess Peach's castle.
Mario, as a dedicated plumber and adventurer, decides to find the 12 Magic Orbs and put them back in their place.
This Super Mario World hack features 94 levels and 112 exits, music, enemies, original bosses and new power-ups.
Bowser has stolen the 12 magic orbs from Peach's castle! Mario must put his courage to test and face all sorts of minions in his way. Collect coins and power-ups and save the Mushroom Kingdom!
